DoGDeskOS Repository
Official package repository and package information portal
Home Packages Documentation Downloads GitHub
```

Repository Status

● Online

Dogdeskos overlay is operational.

Official Packages

  • poke-mini
  • kanto-libs
  • hrun
  • hedit95

Repository Installation

``` 
eselect repository add dogdeskos git https://github.com/doggys-hub/dogdesk-overlay.git
emaint sync -r dogdeskos
```

Latest News

Welcome to the official DoGDeskOS package repository.
```
